title: Prime Minister Siliņa presents her annual report to a seething Saeima
summary_full: Prime Minister Evika Siliņa delivered her review of her government's achievements during the last year to the Saeima on March 12th.
summary_public: Prime Minister Evika Siliņa delivered her review of her government's achievements during the last year to the Saeima on March 12th.
